title: Time Bookings — Clock In / Clock Out

answers.concept: Separate time booking system — iPad kiosk for staff to clock in/out, independent of shifts
answers.who: Staff clock in/out for themselves. Managers can view all bookings and correct/edit them.
answers.granularity: Simple clock in / clock out — one entry per work session. No break tracking for now.
answers.linkage: No linkage — free-form time bookings, not tied to shifts, events, or venues. Single venue for now.
answers.conflicts: Enforce one active at a time — clocking in auto-clocks-out any previous active booking for that staff member.
answers.corrections: Managers/admins can edit or add time bookings retroactively.
answers.reporting: Dashboard showing all time bookings with filtering, total hours summary, and export (CSV/PDF).
answers.manual-entry: Yes — managers can manually add past time bookings with a reason/notes field.
answers.device: iPad kiosk (web app, always-on, accessible in the club). Staff finds their name, taps to clock in/out.
answers.priority: Basic clock in/out kiosk + manager dashboard with corrections and export.
